name: Pork and Black Bean Burritos
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked pork roast, finely chopped
15 ounces canned black beans with cumin and chili spices, drained
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart microwavable casserole, combine the chopped pork, black beans, minced garlic, and Tabasco sauce. Cover and microwave on HIGH until heated through (4-5 minutes), stirring once.
2. Stack the tortillas on a microwavable plate, cover with a slightly dampened paper towel, and microwave for 1-1 1/2 minutes until warm.
3. To serve, spoon about 1/2 cup of pork mixture onto each tortilla. Add toppings and roll up the tortilla. Eat out of hand.
4. Leftover burritos can be reheated by arranging them in a spoke pattern on a microwave plate, covering with a damp paper towel, and microwaving for 1-1 1/2 minutes on HIGH, stirring once.
